sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: 15 Innovative Healthcare Stocks to Buy According to Analysts
feed.summary: This article lists innovative healthcare stocks favored by analysts, focusing on Travere Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:TVTX) as an example. Analyst firms like Piper Sandler and BofA recently raised their price targets for TVTX due to positive pre-announcements and an updated outlook on the company's biopharma coverage. Travere Therapeutics is highlighted as a biopharmaceutical company specializing in rare disease therapies, developing and commercializing new treatments for renal and metabolic conditions.

feed.title: NEXGEL Secures $1.8 Million Financing for Potential Acquisition
feed.summary: NEXGEL Inc. has secured $1.797 million in financing for a potential acquisition, as announced in an SEC filing. This initial funding could lead to an additional $14.869 million investment, pending due diligence. The company expects to provide further details on the acquisition in the first quarter of 2026, with Palladium Capital Group LLC acting as the placement agent.

feed.title: Evergy (NASDAQ:EVRG) Sets New 1-Year High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Evergy (NASDAQ:EVRG) recently reached a new 52-week high, trading as high as $83.19. Several research firms have updated their price targets and ratings on the stock, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $84.25. Institutional investors have also shown increased interest, with significant stake increases from firms like Adage Capital Partners GP L.L.C. and ExodusPoint Capital Management LP.

feed.title: Oxford Lane Capital (NASDAQ:OXLC) Hits New 52-Week Low - Here's Why
feed.summary: Oxford Lane Capital (NASDAQ:OXLC) experienced a new 52-week low, with its stock trading as low as $8.91 and closing at $8.8750. This comes as the company recently announced a monthly dividend of $0.20 per share, yielding 27.2% on an annualized basis. Institutional investors have notably adjusted their holdings, and the company maintains a "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: Saudi's Public Investment Fund dissolves stake in Take-Two Interactive
feed.summary: The Public Investment Fund (PIF) of Saudi Arabia has completely dissolved its stake in Take-Two Interactive. While the specific reasons for this divestment are not detailed, it marks a significant shift in the PIF's investment portfolio.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet, Paragon 28 announce commercial launch of curved TTC nail system
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet and 28 announced the commercial launch of their new Phantom curved TTC nail system, expanding Zimmer Biomet's foot and ankle portfolio following the acquisition of Paragon 28. This next-generation system features a curved design that follows the anatomic arc of the foot, aiming to improve alignment reproducibility, increase torsional stability, and preserve soft tissue compared to traditional straight TTC nails. The launch reinforces Zimmer Biomet's commitment to Paragon 28's innovative orthopedic technology, supporting various TTC fusion procedures.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Reuben Shaffer Sells 1,425 Shares of TE Connectivi
feed.summary: Reuben Shaffer, Senior Vice President at TE Connectivity PLC, sold 1,425 shares of the company, bringing his total ownership to 0 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of 22 insider sells over the past year with no insider buys. The company's shares were trading at $234.23, indicating that the stock is significantly overvalued according to its GF Value of $176.39.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive: Imagining a Healthier Future for All
feed.summary: Ann Tracy, Chief Sustainability Officer at Colgate-Palmolive, is highlighted for her impactful leadership in integrating sustainability with healthcare outcomes and commercial success. Her work focuses on guiding the company towards a net-zero, circular, and inclusive future, with science-based climate goals including emissions reduction, renewable energy, and sustainable packaging. Tracy's three decades of operational expertise allow her to embed sustainability deeply within Colgate-Palmolive's global operations, demonstrating that environmental responsibility can align with business growth.

feed.title: FDA Accepts Bristol Myers Squibb's Iberdomide for Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma
feed.summary: The FDA has accepted Bristol Myers Squibb's New Drug Application for iberdomide, an oral therapy for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma. This drug, a first-in-class cereblon E3 ligase modulator (CELMoD) agent, received priority review and breakthrough therapy designation. Its approval could significantly impact targeted protein degradation and oral oncology treatments, with its development also focusing on minimal residual disease negativity as a primary endpoint in clinical trials.

feed.title: Analysts See Domino's Pizza Stock As Too Cheap Ahead of Earnings Next Week
feed.summary: Ahead of its full-year earnings report next week, Domino's Pizza (DPZ) stock is currently at a one-year low, yet analysts predict higher revenue and EPS for Q4 2025 and 2026. Despite market concerns, the stock appears undervalued based on its forward Price/Earnings ratio compared to historical averages, and various analysts have significantly higher price targets. The author suggests a trading strategy involving selling short out-of-the-money put options and buying longer-dated in-the-money call options to capitalize on the perceived undervaluation and potential upside.

feed.title: Cheerios maker says cost of living, housing expenses changing way consumers spend
feed.summary: General Mills has cut its annual sales and profit forecasts, attributing the change to weak consumer sentiment and evolving consumer purchase patterns. The company noted that consumers are shifting towards healthier and lower-cost food options, partly due to the rise of GLP-1 weight-loss drugs and increased competition for protein. Additionally, Chief Executive Jeff Harmening stated that elevated cost of living and housing pressures are forcing lower- and middle-income consumers to prioritize value in their spending habits.

feed.title: NRG Energy to build $617M power plant in Harris County, Governor Abbott announces
feed.summary: Governor Greg Abbott announced that NRG Energy will build a new $617 million natural gas power generation plant in Harris County, Texas. This 455-megawatt facility, designated under the JETI program, is expected to begin generating power for the Texas grid in 2028. The project aims to enhance grid stability, create jobs, and meet the growing energy demands of the region.

feed.title: Progressive $1.2 million jackpot winner at Horseshoe Council Bluffs Hotel & Casino
feed.summary: A long-time Caesars Rewards member, identified as Michael, won a $1.2 million progressive jackpot at Horseshoe Council Bluffs Hotel & Casino on February 7th. This marks the first winner of Iowa's new multi-casino progressive jackpot, which links several Caesars Entertainment properties across the state. Michael, loyal to Caesars for over 30 years, hit a royal flush playing Ultimate Texas Hold’em.

feed.title: Jabil cuts emissions 47% since 2019
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has significantly reduced its greenhouse gas emissions by 47% since 2019, putting the St. Petersburg manufacturer ahead of schedule for its 2030 climate goal. This progress, detailed in its Fiscal Year 2025 Sustainability Progress Report, stems from increased renewable energy use and improved factory efficiency. The company also highlighted advancements in waste reduction, the deployment of AI in manufacturing operations, and expanded community involvement, all of which are increasingly critical for customer partnerships and long-term growth.

feed.title: Caesars Casino Bonus Code ROTOCASLAUNCH in Feb: Score $1,010 & 2.5K Rewards Credits
feed.summary: The Caesars Casino bonus code ROTOCASLAUNCH offers new players in eligible states a welcome package including a $10 no-deposit bonus, a 100% deposit match up to $1,000, and 2,500 Caesars Rewards Credits. This promotion focuses on slot games with specific wagering requirements and integrates with the Caesars Rewards loyalty program, providing both online and real-world benefits. The article details how to claim the bonus, its value, and compares it to other online casino offers.

feed.title: New Uber–Life360 link lets parents track every teen ride in real time
feed.summary: Life360 and Uber have expanded their strategic partnership to deepen family trip-tracking integration, allowing users to link accounts for coordinated ride booking, real-time tracking, and membership benefits. This integration, rolling out later in 2026, will particularly enhance parental oversight for Uber teen accounts, providing real-time notifications and trip tracking for teens aged 13-17. The collaboration aims to streamline transportation for families and reinforce Life360's position as a family "super app."

feed.title: Life360 and Uber Announce New Integration to Help Families Stay Connected on Every Trip
feed.summary: Uber and Life360 are expanding their strategic partnership to enhance family transportation with greater ease and visibility. This integration will allow users to link their accounts, including Uber teen accounts, facilitating ride coordination and real-time tracking for families. The collaboration aims to provide a seamless experience with features like real-time trip tracking, ride booking, and membership benefits, building on their existing successful cooperation.

feed.title: Earnings Summary – Labcorp Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results and Issues 2026 Guidance
feed.summary: Labcorp (NYSE: LH) has reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, showing revenue growth and improved earnings driven by its diagnostics operations. The company also provided optimistic guidance for full-year 2026, projecting continued revenue and adjusted EPS growth. Key initiatives included strategic acquisitions, significant investments in new facilities, and the launch of over 130 new tests.

feed.title: Keysight Introduces PAM3 Signaling with New GDDR7 Transmitter Compliance Solution for Next-Generation Graphics Memory
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched a new GDDR7 transmitter compliance solution to address the validation challenges arising from the adoption of GDDR7 in high-performance computing, gaming, and AI applications. The solution, which includes D9370GDDC software and the UXR oscilloscope series, automates compliance testing, validates PAM3 signaling under real-world conditions with advanced SNDR measurements, and reduces validation time for next-generation GPU and memory devices. This aims to help engineers accelerate design and deployment with greater accuracy and less risk.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Is Making Much-Needed Changes. Buy the Stock, This Firm Says.
feed.summary: UBS recommends buying Southwest Airlines stock due to recent radical changes in its baggage and seating policies, which are expected to benefit shareholders despite potential dissatisfaction from loyal customers. The firm believes these changes, introduced over the last year, are much-needed for the airline.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) Reaches New 12-Month High - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) recently hit a new 52-week high of $172.80, with a consensus "Buy" rating from Wall Street analysts and a price target of $185.90. Despite significant insider selling over the past quarter, institutional investors maintain a strong position, owning approximately 90% of the company's stock. The company, an independent oil and natural gas producer focused on the Permian Basin, has a market capitalization of $47.8 billion and a P/E ratio of 11.6.

feed.title: Baird Upgrades Wells Fargo (WFC)
feed.summary: Baird has upgraded Wells Fargo (WFC) from Underperform to Neutral. Analysts project an 18.57% upside for WFC, with an average one-year price target of $103.14/share. The report also details institutional ownership and fund sentiment, noting a slight decrease in the number of funds holding WFC but an increase in average portfolio weight dedicated to the stock.

feed.title: USA Compression: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners LP (USAC) reported a fourth-quarter net income of $27.8 million, or 22 cents per share. After adjustments for non-recurring costs, earnings were 28 cents per share, meeting Wall Street expectations. The company also posted revenues of $252.5 million for the quarter and full-year profits of $111.3 million on revenues of $998.1 million.

feed.title: RBC Capital Raises Target Price for Mohawk Industries (MHK) | MH
feed.summary: RBC Capital has raised its target price for Mohawk Industries (MHK) to $135 from $122, maintaining a "Sector Perform" rating. This adjustment represents a 10.66% increase in the target price. The average target price from 17 analysts is currently $142.89, suggesting a 9.02% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $113.86, indicating a potential 13.13% downside.

feed.title: SN top 10: Kroger finally makes its big hire
feed.summary: Kroger has appointed Greg Foran, former CEO of Walmart U.S. and Air New Zealand, as its new CEO after a year-long search. Foran is credited with boosting digital capabilities at Walmart and leading Air New Zealand through a digital transformation and the pandemic. His hire was the top story last week for Supermarket News, which also covered other significant retail developments.

feed.title: Citi Sticks to Their Hold Rating for Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT)
feed.summary: Citi analysts have reiterated a Hold rating on Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT) with a price target of $335.00. This follows similar Hold ratings from other firms, though J.P. Morgan maintained a Buy rating. Hilton recently reported strong quarterly revenues of $3.12 billion and a net profit of $420 million for the quarter ending September 30.

feed.title: ‘More impact, less waste’: Coca-Cola CFO praises impact of marketing ‘transformation’
feed.summary: Coca-Cola's CFO, John Murphy, and incoming CEO, Henrique Braun, have lauded the company's marketing "transformation" for driving greater impact and efficiency. This reinvention focuses on leveraging digital and "experiences" to connect with consumers, moving from broad campaigns to hyper-personalized engagement, particularly highlighted for the upcoming Fifa World Cup. Braun also introduced the "4Is" framework—insights, innovation, intimacy, and integration—as key to the company's consumer-centric approach and future strategy.

feed.title: 80 years of dividend checks: Essential Utilities declares next $0.3426 payout
feed.summary: Essential Utilities Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3426 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 12, 2026. The company has a long history of dividend payments, having paid consecutive quarterly cash dividends for 80 years and increasing the dividend 35 times in the last 34 years. Essential Utilities operates as Aqua and Peoples brands, serving approximately 5.5 million people across nine states with water, wastewater, and natural gas services.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Has Lowered Expectations for Sixth Street Specialty Lending (NYSE:TSLX) Stock Price
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has reduced its price target for Sixth Street Specialty Lending (NYSE:TSLX) from $23.00 to $22.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating. Several other firms, including Royal Bank of Canada, Wells Fargo & Company, and Truist Financial, have also lowered their price targets for the stock. Despite these adjustments, the company still holds an average "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $22.88.

feed.title: Should You Buy Extra Space Storage Stock Before Feb. 19?
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (EXR) is a dependable real estate investment trust (REIT) known for stability and consistent cash flow, making it a "sleep well at night" stock rather than a high-growth opportunity. While it benefits from the self-storage sector's resilience, its growth story is cooling as pandemic-era catalysts fade, leading to a range-bound stock performance. Investors are likely to see modest returns and a steady dividend, but not significant market outperformance.

feed.title: Stock Traders Buy Large Volume of Caesars Entertainment Call Options (NASDAQ:CZR)
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment (NASDAQ:CZR) experienced unusual options trading on Tuesday, with investors purchasing 19,839 call options, a 49% increase from the typical daily volume. The stock traded up $0.21, reaching $18.35, but its trading volume was lower than average. Caesars Entertainment currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a consensus target price of $34.61, despite recent downgrades from some firms.

feed.title: RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE:RLJ) Short Interest Up 21.0% in January
feed.summary: Short interest in RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE:RLJ) saw a significant increase of 21.0% in January, reaching over 12.87 million shares. This equates to a short-interest ratio of 7.8 days, with 8.8% of the company's stock currently sold short. While analysts have issued varied ratings, the company currently holds a "Hold" consensus with an average price target of $8.64.

feed.title: Experts say seven-year disinformation attack on Freedom Holding cost $20 million
feed.summary: Kazakhstan's media landscape has seen a seven-year-long disinformation campaign against Freedom Holding and its founder, Timur Turlov, identified by experts. This extensive negative PR effort has cost an estimated $20 million to $50 million, involving the generation of tens of thousands of negative "news" pieces, primarily on Telegram. The attack aims to damage the company's reputation and manipulate search engine results, suggesting an orchestrated effort by competitors reacting to Freedom Holding's aggressive business expansion.

feed.title: CoStar Launches AI Experience, Refining the Future of Home Shopping
feed.summary: CoStar Group has launched Homes AI, an AI-powered experience integrated into Homes.com, enabling real-time, two-way conversations for home searching. This technology uses Microsoft Azure OpenAI and Homes.com's extensive property data to offer personalized guidance, aiming to transform the home discovery process while ensuring real estate agents remain central to transactions. CoStar plans to expand this AI capability across its other platforms.

feed.title: Sixth Street Specialty Lending stock hits 52-week low at $18.57
feed.summary: Sixth Street Specialty Lending Inc. (TSLX) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $18.57, marking a significant 19.05% decrease over the past year and 16.23% in the last six months, with its RSI indicating oversold conditions. Despite these declines, the company maintains a P/E ratio of 10.38 and a strong 10.35% dividend yield, having consistently paid dividends for 13 years. Analysts remain cautiously optimistic with price targets between $21 and $25, while the company recently surpassed Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations despite a lowered price target by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods due to depreciation affecting net asset value.

feed.title: Kroger’s $23M Parkaire expansion to include fuel center
feed.summary: Kroger is undertaking a $23 million renovation and expansion of its Parkaire Landing store in East Cobb, increasing its size from 59,000 to 85,000 square feet. The project, expected to be completed by spring 2027, will include a new 12-pump fuel center, an expanded produce department, an enlarged deli, a full-service Murray’s cheese counter, and a sushi kiosk. The store will remain open during construction.

feed.title: 22 New 4-Star Stocks This Week
feed.summary: Morningstar identified 22 U.S.-listed stocks that became undervalued, shifting to a 4-star rating, including major companies like IBM and Arista Networks. This analysis is based on Morningstar's proprietary rating system, which considers a stock's price, fair value estimate, and Uncertainty Rating. The overall U.S. market remains moderately undervalued, with 35% of Morningstar-covered stocks considered undervalued.

feed.title: Ford CEO Elected To Board Of McDonalds
feed.summary: Ford President and CEO Jim Farley has been elected to the Board of Directors for McDonald's Corporation, while simultaneously stepping down from the board of Harley-Davidson. Farley will be one of 12 board members for the fast-food giant, bringing his experience in balancing innovation, customer experience, and technology to McDonald's. His election comes as he concludes his tenure on the Harley-Davidson board and he expressed admiration for McDonald's as a "values-driven, forward-looking company."

feed.title: RELX boosts treasury stock with latest £40m share buyback tranche
feed.summary: RELX plc has completed another share buyback, purchasing 1.8 million ordinary shares for treasury on February 17, 2026, via UBS AG London Branch. This transaction, executed at an average price of 2,235.83 pence per share, increases the company's treasury holding to nearly 18 million shares and reduces shares in issue to approximately 1.81 billion. The ongoing buyback program is part of RELX’s capital management strategy, aiming to enhance earnings per share and demonstrate confidence in future performance and cash generation.

feed.title: 25 Newly Overvalued Stocks this Week
feed.summary: Morningstar identifies 25 US-listed stocks that have recently become overvalued, warranting 1- or 2-star ratings. Key companies moving into the 2-star category include Procter & Gamble, Novartis, McDonald's, Lowe's Companies, and Rolls-Royce Holdings, while Mizuho Financial Group, Itaú Unibanco Holding, Sherwin-Williams, Hilton Worldwide Holdings, and Vistra are among the new 1-star stocks. The article explains Morningstar's rating system, which considers stock price, fair value estimate, and uncertainty rating to assess valuation.

feed.title: Vizsla Silver Corp. Stock Experiences Turbulent Market Movements
feed.summary: Vizsla Silver Corp.'s stock (VZLA) has experienced turbulent market movements, trading down by -7.29% amid investor caution and fluctuating stock values. The company's recent financial performance for Q3 2025 showed a slight cash increase but negative operating cash flow, limited profitability, and concerns regarding operational efficiencies and potential overvaluation. Analysts are closely watching Vizsla Silver as it navigates competitive pressures, technological influences, global economic shifts, and the need for adaptable strategies in the mining industry.

feed.title: HD Jumps 17% in 3 Months: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell the Stock?
feed.summary: Home Depot (HD) shares have risen 17% in the last three months, outpacing the broader market but lagging some peers. The company is strengthening its position through Pro ecosystem expansion, digital innovation, and efficient capital allocation, though downward estimate revisions and a premium valuation tempered by high interest rates and subdued housing turnover raise concerns about short-term growth.

feed.title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. has released its annual Form 10-K report, showcasing robust financial performance with increased revenues, operating income, and net income, alongside significant diluted EPS growth. The report outlines strategic initiatives, including the NorthStar 2030 strategy focused on key growth pillars, and details capital management actions and the acquisition of Entrust. Despite strong performance, the company acknowledges significant challenges and risks, predominantly its reliance on U.S. government contracts, intense competition, supply chain issues, and cybersecurity threats.

feed.title: Beverage Stocks: KO, PEP, KDP, SNYR Positioned for Accelerating Growth and Sector Expansion in 2026
feed.summary: Leading beverage companies Coca-Cola (KO) and PepsiCo (PEP) are seen as stable investments with proven global strength and defensive growth, while Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) is undergoing a strategic restructuring with a potential spinoff. Smaller cap Synergy CHC (SNYR) presents an asymmetric growth opportunity in the rapidly expanding functional beverage market, leveraging its FOCUSfactor® brand. The 2026 outlook for the sector highlights margin expansion, international growth, functional beverages, and strategic M&A.

feed.title: Return of 'YOLO' market: Wells Fargo thinks hefty tax refunds will boost bitcoin and these speculative stocks
feed.summary: Wells Fargo anticipates a return of the "YOLO" market fueled by hefty tax refunds, which could inject $150 billion into markets by March. This liquidity is expected to boost speculative assets like Bitcoin and retail investor favorites such as Robinhood and Boeing. The bank predicts high-income consumers will channel these savings into equities, driving increased speculation.

feed.title: Luke Combs and Opry Entertainment Group Launch Category 10 at Universal CityWalk
feed.summary: Luke Combs and Opry Entertainment Group announced plans to open a Category 10 venue at Universal Orlando Resort's CityWalk, targeted for late 2027. This marks the third location for the brand, inspired by Combs' hit song "Hurricane," following venues in Nashville and a planned Las Vegas debut. The Orlando location will feature experiential areas influenced by Combs' music and passions, further expanding authentic country music experiences to a global audience.

feed.title: Quantum Computing Firm QBTS Faces Financial Challenges Amid Future Prospects
feed.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (QBTS) is facing significant financial challenges, marked by consistent losses and a negative profit margin, despite holding a strong gross margin of 82.8% and robust liquidity. While the company demonstrates technological promise in the evolving quantum computing sector, investors are weighing current fiscal struggles against the potential for future growth from product innovation. QBTS's volatile stock performance reflects this balancing act between present difficulties and anticipated breakthroughs.

feed.title: Amazon vs. Alibaba: Which E-Commerce Titan Has an Edge Right Now?
feed.summary: This article compares Amazon (AMZN) and Alibaba (BABA), the world's largest e-commerce and cloud computing companies, to determine which is a better investment. It highlights Amazon's strong momentum in retail and AWS, driven by significant investments in AI and a robust order backlog, while Alibaba faces challenges with mixed financial results, regulatory uncertainties in China, and eroding profitability despite growth in its Cloud Intelligence Group. The analysis concludes that Amazon has a clear edge due to its predictable cash flows, lower regulatory risks, and stronger financial outlook, despite Alibaba's recent stock recovery.

feed.title: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) Stock Price Down 8.4% Following Weak Earnings
feed.summary: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) stock fell 8.4% after reporting Q4 earnings per share of $1.94, missing the $2.01 consensus, and revenue of $1.03 billion, slightly below estimates. Despite the miss, the company increased its quarterly dividend by 8% to $0.55 and issued FY2026 EPS guidance of $8.70–$8.90, indicating confidence in future cash flow. Analysts currently maintain a "Hold" rating for the stock with an average price target of $174.25.

feed.title: How Beverly Hills advisor became Forbes’ No.1 in California
feed.summary: Lisa Detanna, Managing Director and Private Wealth Advisor at Raymond James' Global Wealth Solutions Group, has been ranked #1 on Forbes' 2026 "Top Women Wealth Advisors Best‑In‑State" list for California. This recognition highlights her exceptional leadership, client impact, and expertise in serving high-net-worth families, based on criteria like client retention, industry experience, and assets under management. Detanna, with over 30 years of experience, leads a team providing comprehensive family office support, emphasizing a deep understanding and long-term partnership with her clients.
